Hearing Re Settlement And Request To Court To Vacate Statement Of Decision
Off Calendar Nov-24-2004 Denied

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE - TRIAL COURTS
Off Calendar Nov-03-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: SCOTT BONAGOFSKY ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFFS JUDY SCHAEFER AND WILLIAM SCHAEFER
TIMOTHY M. FLAHERTY AND ELIZABETH A. ENGLAND OF CARROLL, BURDICK AND MCDONOUGH LLP FOR DEFENDANTS ROBERT IMHOFF, NUMENOR CORPORATION, AND ALONSO CARILLO.

THIS CAUSE CAME ON REGULARLY FOR CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE THIS DAY. ALL PARTIES WERE PRESENT AS INDICATED ABOVE. SECOND PHASE OF JURY TRIAL NOTED BY COURT. PRIOR TO CONFERENCE, PLAINTIFF ADVISED COURT 998 SETTLEMENT OFFERED BY DEFENDANTS WAS ACCEPTED. COURT ORDERED COUNSEL TO SUBMIT BRIEFS BY NO LATER THAN NOVEMBER 12, 2004. MATTER IS STILL SCHEDULED FOR TRIAL ON DECEMBER 6, 2004. IF NO DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE FILED, COURT REQUIRED COUNSEL TO SUBMIT THE FOLLOWING BEFORE TRIAL: TRIAL BRIEFS, JURY INSTRUCTIONS, IN LIMINE MOTIONS, LISTS OF WITNESSES AND TESTIMONIES, VOIR DIRE QUESTIONNAIRES, EXHIBITS INCLUDING PREMARKING THEM. COURT SET TIME LIMIT FOR EACH COUNSEL. ON VOIR DIRE, EACH SIDE IS GIVEN 1 HOUR AND 20 MINUTES; FOR THE DURATION OF THE TRIAL, 8 HOURS INCLUDING OPENING AND CLOSING STATEMENTS. IF MATTER IS NOT RESOLVED BY 4:00 PM OF NOVEMBER 29TH, COURT WILL SCHEDULE PRE TRIAL CONFERENCE BEFORE 12/6/04 AFTER ALL MATERIALS ARE REVIEWED.

JUDGE THOMAS J. MELLON, JR, CLERK CLARK BANAYAD, REPORTER MITCH LYON, CSR #6840 (514).
